recommendations.title: Orion and the Dark
recommendations.overview: A boy with an active imagination faces his fears on an unforgettable journey through the night with his new friend: a giant, smiling creature named Dark.

recommendations.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid
recommendations.overview: Greg Heffley is a scrawny but ambitious kid with an active imagination and big plans to be rich and famous – he just has to survive middle school first.

recommendations.title: A Shaun the Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: When an alien with amazing powers crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun the Sheep goes on a mission to shepherd the intergalactic visitor home before a sinister organization can capture her.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo and the Alien Invaders
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, Mystery, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A cosmic case of flying saucers, intergalactic intrigue and out-of-this-world romance launches Scooby-Doo! and the Mystery Inc., Gang into their most unearthly adventure ever.

recommendations.title: Lightyear
recommendations.overview: Legendary Space Ranger Buzz Lightyear embarks on an intergalactic adventure alongside a group of ambitious recruits and his robot companion Sox.

recommendations.title: Flow
recommendations.overview: A solitary cat, displaced by a great flood, finds refuge on a boat with various species and must navigate the challenges of adapting to a transformed world together.

recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.

recommendations.title: Treasure Planet
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Adventure, Animation, Family, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: When space galleon cabin boy Jim Hawkins discovers a map to an intergalactic "loot of a thousand worlds," a cyborg cook named John Silver teaches him to battle supernovas and space storms on their journey to find treasure.

recommendations.title: Dragons: Gift of the Night Fury
recommendations.overview: Hiccup and Toothless go on an exciting adventure and discover an island of new dragons.

recommendations.title: Doraemon the Movie: Nobita's Little Star Wars 2021
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Comedy
recommendations.overview: During summer vacation Nobita picks up a small rocket containing Papi, a palm-sized alien president escaping rebels on his home planet Pirika.
